2025-05-23T19:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge, with details as shown below: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge are lowered from 100km/h to 50 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge is lowered from 80km/h to 50 km/h.
2025-05-23T19:50:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋主橋已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： (i)港珠澳大橋主橋的快線及中線車速限制由每小時100公里降至每小時50 公里；及 (ii)港珠澳大橋主橋的慢線車速限制由每小時80公里降至每小時50 公里。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Concerts in Kai Tak MTR train service arrangements
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德演唱會港鐵列車服務安排

2025-05-24T12:20:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Kai Tak Sports Park will host concerts in the evenings on 24 and 25 May. Passenger heading to the venue, should exit at either Kai Tak or Sung Wong Toi Station. Passenger should set off early. 

After the show, MTR Corporation Limited will increase the train frequency as necessary to facilitate passengers' return. Allow extra time for your journeys and have your return ticket ready in advance. 
Departure time of the last train connecting to Lo Wu:
Sung Wong Toi Station: 22:59
Kai Tak Station: 23:01
.
2025-05-24T12:20:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，啟德體育園於5⽉24及25⽇晚上舉⾏演唱會，前往觀賞的乘客可使⽤啟德或宋皇臺站。乘客可預早出發。

散場時，港鐵公司會按需要加密列⾞班次。請為⾏程預留較多時間及準備回程⾞票。
羅湖尾班⾞時間：
宋皇臺站:22:59
啟德站:23:01
。

2025-05-24T13:25:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that as informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, advance ticket sales for the following train trips will be suspended due to train scheduling arrangements. For June 4 and onwards: - G6532 (To Shanwei Station), - G828/5 (From Xianbei Station) For June 5 and onwards: - G826/7 (To Xianbei Station) - G6531 (From Shanwei Station) For the latest advance ticket sales arrangements, please refer to the 12306 official website and mobile app, High Speed Rail website (12306. cn) and mobile app.
2025-05-24T13:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，內地鐵路單位通報，因應列車調度安排，以下車次會暫停預售。 6月4日及以後的車次： -G6532 （前往汕尾站） -G828/5（由西安北站出發） 6月5日及以後的車次： -G826/7（前往西安北站） -G6531（由汕尾站出發） 有關最新預售安排，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)及手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。
